# Edo Tensei Full Context Documentation
> This file contains the complete text of all key documentation for Edo Tensei, intended for use by AI agents and LLMs.

---
# Edo Tensei – AI Session Handoff Manager

Edo Tensei is a VS Code extension that extracts local AI session histories from multiple IDEs and packages them into a ready-to-paste handoff prompt. When an AI quota or session limit runs out mid-task, switching IDEs normally means losing all conversation history. Edo Tensei makes the handoff one click.

## Supported IDEs

| IDE / Agent | Local Storage | Notes |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| GitHub Copilot Chat | %APPDATA%/Code/User/…/chatSessions/ | JSON & JSONL |
| Cursor | ~/.cursor/projects/ | JSONL |
| Claude Code CLI | ~/.claude/projects/ | JSONL |
| OpenAI Codex CLI | ~/.codex/ | JSONL |
| Kiro | %APPDATA%/Kiro/…/kiroagent/ | JSON (.chat) |
| Windsurf | ~/.codeium/windsurf/cascade/ | Binary (path-only handoff) |
| Antigravity | ~/.gemini/antigravity/brain/ | Preview log only |

## Key Features

- Multi-IDE Extraction: Automatically scans all supported IDEs, grouped by IDE → Project → Session.
- Project-Scoped Scan: Filters to sessions matching the current workspace.
- Two Handoff Modes:
  - Path mode (default): Outputs session file path + per-IDE reading guide. Token-efficient.
  - Full-text mode: Embeds the complete conversation.
- One-Click Resurrect: Copies formatted handoff prompt to clipboard.
- Export to .edo_tensei/: Saves prompts as Markdown, organized by IDE/project/timestamp.
- Raw File Preview: Opens original session file in VS Code.
- .gitignore Helper: Prompts to add .edo_tensei/ to avoid accidental commits.

## Configuration

- edoTensei.handoffMode: "path" (default) or "fullText"
- edoTensei.promptLanguage: "English" (default) or "Traditional Chinese"
- edoTensei.customScanPaths: Object overriding default scan paths per IDE

## Commands

- Scan Project Sessions: Find sessions matching current workspace
- Fetch ALL Historical Sessions: Scan every IDE
- Copy Handoff Prompt: Copy handoff prompt for selected session
- View Parsed Session: Open Markdown preview
- Preview Raw Session File: Open original session file
- Copy Raw File Path: Copy session file path
- Export Session to .edo_tensei: Save as Markdown file
- Export All Sessions to .edo_tensei: Save all scanned sessions

## Privacy

Completely local-first. All extraction and parsing runs on your machine. No data is sent to any external server.

## Known Limitations

- Trae: Not yet supported (SQLCipher encryption, no public key).
- Windsurf: Binary protobuf format. Path mode only.
- Antigravity: Preview log only (~900 chars/message). Full history in cloud only.

---
## Architecture

The extension is structured as:

- extension.ts: Entry point, command registration, .gitignore helper, file system watcher
- core/SessionHandoffService.ts: Orchestrates all extractors in parallel, caches results, builds handoff prompts
- core/extractors/types.ts: IChatExtractor interface, CapturedSession and ChatMessage types
- core/extractors/*Extractor.ts: One extractor per IDE, all implement IChatExtractor
- ui/SessionHandoffProvider.ts: TreeDataProvider for the Activity Bar sidebar

### IChatExtractor Interface

Every extractor implements:
- ideId: string — identifies the IDE (e.g. "copilot", "claude", "cursor")
- extract(workspacePath?, customScanPaths?): Promise<CapturedSession> — returns most recent session
- extractAll(workspacePath?, customScanPaths?): Promise<CapturedSession[]> — returns all sessions

### CapturedSession Shape

{
  sourceIde: string,       // "copilot" | "claude" | "cursor" | "kiro" | "windsurf" | "antigravity" | "codex"
  capturedAt: string,      // ISO 8601 timestamp
  sessionId?: string,
  title?: string,
  workspacePath?: string,
  messages: ChatMessage[],
  rawPath?: string,        // absolute path to the source session file
  readStatus: "success" | "empty" | "not_found" | "error"
}

### Handoff Prompt Logic

buildPromptFromCapturedSession() selects between two modes:
- path mode: calls buildPathHandoffPrompt() — outputs rawPath + per-IDE reading guide from IDE_READ_GUIDES. Falls back to fullText if the IDE has no registered guide (e.g. Windsurf binary).
- fullText mode: calls buildFullTextPrompt() — embeds all parsed messages inline.

Both modes respect edoTensei.promptLanguage (English or Traditional Chinese).

### Default Scan Paths (per OS environment variable / home dir)

- Copilot: %APPDATA%/Code/User/globalStorage/emptyWindowChatSessions/ and workspaceStorage
- Cursor: os.homedir()/.cursor/projects/
- Claude: os.homedir()/.claude/projects/
- Codex: os.homedir()/.codex/
- Kiro: %APPDATA%/Kiro/User/globalStorage/kiro.kiroagent/
- Windsurf: os.homedir()/.codeium/windsurf/cascade/
- Antigravity: os.homedir()/.gemini/antigravity/brain/

---
## Development

### Build

npm run build        # one-time esbuild bundle → dist/extension.js
npm run watch        # rebuild on save

### Debug

Press F5 in VS Code to launch Extension Development Host.
After source changes: npm run build, then Ctrl+R in host window.

### Publishing

npm install -g @vscode/vsce
npm run build
vsce package
vsce publish

---
## Changelog

### [1.0.0] - Initial Release

- Core Extraction: Standalone VS Code extension for session handoff.
- Multi-IDE Support: Claude Code CLI, Windsurf, Cursor, Copilot Chat, Kiro, Antigravity, OpenAI Codex.
- Intelligent Title Generation: Parses chat logs to extract meaningful user intent.
- Hierarchical View: IDE → Project → Session.
- Resurrect Session: One-click context formatting for handoff to a new AI agent.
- Path Handoff Mode: Token-efficient mode outputting file path + per-IDE reading guide.
- Full-text Handoff Mode: Embeds complete conversation for maximum compatibility.
- .gitignore Helper: Prompts to exclude .edo_tensei/ from version control.
- Export to .edo_tensei/: Saves handoff prompts as Markdown files.
